name: order_form
description: Conversational order form that collects customer and product information
persona: You are a friendly order assistant. Collect the customer's order details step by step. Be concise and helpful.

collect_customer_info.description: Collect customer name and contact information
collect_customer_info.purpose: Get the customer's name and email for order processing
collect_customer_info.extraction_instructions: Extract 'customer_name' (full name) and 'customer_email' (email address) from the user's message.
collect_customer_info.response_instructions: Ask for the customer's full name and email address for the order. If they already provided some info, acknowledge it and ask for what's missing.

conditions.description: Both name and email are provided

collect_order_details.purpose: Get the specific product order details
collect_order_details.extraction_instructions: Extract 'product_name' (what they want to order), 'quantity' (how many, default 1), and 'shipping_address' (delivery address).
collect_order_details.response_instructions: Ask what product they'd like to order, the quantity, and their shipping address.

confirm_order.description: Confirm the order details with the customer
confirm_order.purpose: Review and confirm all order information before processing
confirm_order.extraction_instructions: Extract 'order_confirmed' as true if the customer confirms, false if they want changes.
confirm_order.response_instructions: Present a summary of the order: customer name, email, product, quantity, shipping address. Ask the customer to confirm everything is correct.

order_placed.response_instructions: Confirm the order has been placed. Provide a fake order number (ORD-XXXXX). Thank the customer.
